what_i_built: A QR code generator with customizable colors, sizes, and download. Uses a client-side QR library — your data never leaves the browser.
what_was_tricky: The QR spec itself is wild. I used an existing library (qrcode.js) rather than implementing Reed-Solomon error correction from scratch — some things aren't worth reinventing. The tricky part was making the color picker work well: certain foreground/background combos make unreadable QR codes, and I had to decide whether to warn users or just let them experiment.
fun_facts: QR codes can hold up to ~3KB of data, which is more than most people expect
I let users pick bad color combos on purpose — constraints kill creativity
